description.unified: Deals of Attack Power as Magic Damage 5 times to a random enemy and inflicts Shock. Enemies in Shock are stunned for [2 sec->1.8 sec].
For 6 sec, restores HP by of Attack Power every 1 sec. You cannot take other actions while the skill is active, but all allies' Magic Damage taken is reduced by [60%->25%].
For 7 sec, increases all allies' Attack by 206(1+0.3Skill Level), Attack Speed by 42%, and Critical Hit Chance by [150->420].

Deals of Attack Power as Magic Damage to 4 enemies, then inflicts Shock for 20 sec. On a critical hit, stuns them for 0.6 sec. For each enemy in Shock, damage taken by you is reduced by 15%, up to 3 stacks. Shock: For 20 sec, deals continuous Magic Damage equal to 25% of Attack Power every 1 sec.

dark.unified: For 10 sec, the target's Magic Damage taken is increased by [10%->30%].
If the number of enemies is [{1} -> 3] or fewer, removes the target's beneficial effects.
When hit, reduces the attacker's Attack Speed by [{2}% -> 200%] and their Mana by [{3} -> 100] per sec for [{1} -> 5] sec. This effect can only trigger once every [{4} -> 5] sec.

description.unified: On Normal Attack, has a [{0}% -> 30%] chance to deal Magic Damage equal to [{1}% -> {0}%] of Attack Power to 2 random enemies and reduce their Attack by [{2}% -> {1}%] for 10 sec. If they are shocked, they are stunned for [0.5 sec->2 sec].
